name: agent-playbook-suite
description: A curated suite of agent workflow skills for docs-backed project planning, milestone delivery, verification, and simplification.

interface.shortDescription: Docs-backed workflow skills for agent-led software delivery.
interface.longDescription: Agent Playbook Suite bundles the docs, project-foundation, create-milestones, ship-milestone, sync-and-commit, and simplify skills for running durable project planning and milestone delivery loops with Codex.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use the Agent Playbook Suite workflow for this project.
